Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management

Class LoggersResource

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestResource
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.BasicRestResource
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management.LoggersResource
All Implemented Interfaces:
BasicUniversalConfig, DefaultConfig, DefaultHtmlConfig
public class LoggersResource extends BasicRestResource
Child-resource flavor of the /loggers runtime log-level management endpoint.

Mounts as a routed child via @Rest(children=LoggersResource.class) under the subtree /loggers and delegates to a shared LoggersManager worker — the same logic the mixin flavor uses, so the two forms cannot drift. Extends BasicRestResource so the returned beans serialize via the BasicUniversalConfig set (mirrors HealthResource).

Backend:
  • Drives java.util.logging by default; declare a Logback / Log4j2 backend explicitly via LoggersSettings.Builder.backend(LogBackend) — see LogBackend.
See Also:
  • LoggersMixin
  • LoggersManager
  • LogBackend
Since:
10.0.0

  • Method Details

    • getLoggers

      public Map<String,String> getLoggers(RestRequest req)
      [GET /] - All loggers and their configured levels.
      Returns:
      A sorted map of logger name to configured level (empty string = inherited).

    • getLogger

      public String getLogger(RestRequest req, @Path("name") String name)
      [GET /{name}] - One logger's configured level.
      Parameters:
      req - The HTTP request.
      name - The logger name ("ROOT" for the root logger).
      Returns:
      The configured level name, empty string if inherited.
      Throws:
      NotFound - If no logger with that name is registered.

    • setLogger

      public String setLogger(RestRequest req, @Path("name") String name, @Content String level)
      [PUT /{name}] - Set a logger's level at runtime.

      Sensitive (mutating) — deny-by-default: responds 403 unless a LoggersSettings bean with writes enabled is registered.

      Parameters:
      req - The HTTP request.
      name - The logger name ("ROOT" for the root logger).
      level - The level name (e.g. FINE, INFO, OFF), or blank to inherit from the ancestor.
      Returns:
      The newly-configured level (empty string if inherited).
      Throws:
      Forbidden - If the set-level endpoint is not enabled.

    • setLoggerPost

      public String setLoggerPost(RestRequest req, @Path("name") String name, @Content String level)
      [POST /{name}] - Set a logger's level at runtime (POST alias of setLogger(RestRequest,String,String)).
      Parameters:
      req - The HTTP request.
      name - The logger name ("ROOT" for the root logger).
      level - The level name, or blank to inherit.
      Returns:
      The newly-configured level (empty string if inherited).
      Throws:
      Forbidden - If the set-level endpoint is not enabled.
